description: Structured target job model extracted from a job description.

title.description: Canonical job title or role name extracted from the JD.

companyName.description: Canonical company or hiring organization name extracted from the JD.

coreThemes.description: Concise technical or domain themes from the role.

interviewRounds.description: Likely 2 to 5 interview rounds inferred from JD evidence, role seniority, company or industry nature, team or business context, and hiring-process hints, including count, type, display name, duration, and focus.

sequence.description: One-based round order inferred from the likely interview process.

type.description: Stable round category inferred from the JD.

name.description: Candidate-facing round name in the response language.

durationMinutes.description: Estimated interview duration in minutes inferred from the round category and JD context.

focus.description: Concise likely focus for this round, grounded in the JD and the inferred company, industry, seniority, and role context.

strengths.description: Candidate-fit strengths that the JD would reward.

gaps.description: Preparation gaps implied by the JD.

riskSignals.description: Risk or ambiguity signals in the JD; also source material for inferred hidden_signal requirements.

requirements.description: Interview-ready requirements used to build target job requirement records. Must include at least one hidden_signal item with inferred evidence.

description.description: Optional explanation of why the requirement matters.

evidenceLevel.description: Whether the requirement was explicit or inferred.
